weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 20 total findings, with 14 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-23918, CVE-2026-22679, and others, each observed only once. The active security domains have been diverse, spanning Cloud and IAM, Containers and K8s, Crypto Libraries, OS and Kernel, as well as various programming language ecosystems. Notably, the most active day was 2026-05-05, suggesting a recent surge in security-related activity, warranting continued vigilance across these domains to mitigate potential risks and ensure the security posture of our infrastructure.
